---
name: Bug / task
about: Defect or bounded unit of work with a clear acceptance condition
title: ""
labels: ["bug"]
---

Scope: S | M | L

## Summary

What's broken or missing, in one paragraph. Include the smallest repro you have.

## Acceptance

- [ ] Concrete, checkable conditions. Each item passes or fails on its own.
- [ ] Include the regression test or manual smoke that proves it.

## Non-goals

What this issue is explicitly not fixing. Prevents scope drift during agent runs.

## Notes

Reproduction details, related issues, environment specifics, suspected cause.
